DECLARE kname, cvalue VARCHAR; kname := xenc_SPKI_read (null, replace (get_keyword ('key', params), '\r\n', '')); xenc_x509_generate ('id_rsa', kname, sequence_next ('ca_id_rsa'), 365, vector ('CN', 'Test User', 'C', 'US', 'O', 'Test Org', 'OU', 'IT', 'emailAddress', 'test@example.com'), vector ('subjectAltName', 'URI:http://example.com', 'nsComment', 'Virtuoso Generated Certificate', 'authorityKeyIdentifier', 'keyid,issuer:always'));

DECLARE kname VARCHAR; kname := xenc_SPKI_read (null, replace (get_keyword ('key', params), '\r\n', '')); xenc_x509_generate ('id_rsa', kname, sequence_next ('ca_id_rsa'), 1, vector ('CN', 'Short Validity', 'C', 'GB', 'O', 'Short Org', 'OU', 'Marketing', 'emailAddress', 'short@example.com'), vector ('subjectAltName', 'URI:http://shortvalidity.com'));

DECLARE kname VARCHAR; kname := xenc_SPKI_read (null, replace (get_keyword ('key', params), '\r\n', '')); xenc_x509_generate ('id_rsa', kname, sequence_next ('ca_id_rsa'), 730, vector ('CN', get_keyword ('name', params, name), 'C', get_keyword ('c', params, name), 'O', get_keyword ('o', params, name), 'OU', get_keyword ('ou', params, name), 'emailAddress', get_keyword ('email', params)), vector ('subjectAltName', 'URI:' || webid, 'nsComment', 'Extended Validity Test', 'authorityKeyIdentifier', 'keyid,issuer:always'));

DECLARE kname VARCHAR; kname := xenc_SPKI_read (null, replace (get_keyword ('key', params), '\r\n', '')); xenc_x509_generate ('id_rsa', kname, sequence_next ('ca_id_rsa'), 3650, vector ('CN', 'Long-term Cert', 'C', 'CA', 'O', 'Long Org', 'OU', 'Compliance', 'emailAddress', 'longterm@example.com'), vector ('subjectAltName', 'URI:http://longterm.org', 'nsComment', 'Certificate for Long-term Use', 'authorityKeyIdentifier', 'keyid,issuer:always'));

DECLARE kname VARCHAR; kname := xenc_SPKI_read (null, replace (get_keyword ('key', params), '\r\n', '')); SELECT xenc_x509_generate ('id_rsa', kname, sequence_next ('ca_id_rsa'), 365, vector ('CN', (SELECT name FROM users WHERE id = 1), 'C', (SELECT country FROM users WHERE id = 1), 'O', (SELECT org FROM users WHERE id = 1), 'OU', (SELECT ou FROM users WHERE id = 1), 'emailAddress', (SELECT email FROM users WHERE id = 1)), vector ('subjectAltName', 'URI:' || (SELECT webid FROM users WHERE id = 1), 'nsComment', 'Dynamic User Certificate', 'authorityKeyIdentifier', 'keyid,issuer:always'));

CREATE TABLE certificates (id INT PRIMARY KEY, cert_data VARCHAR, owner_email VARCHAR); DECLARE kname VARCHAR; kname := xenc_SPKI_read (null, replace (get_keyword ('key', params), '\r\n', '')); INSERT INTO certificates VALUES (sequence_next ('cert_id'), xenc_x509_generate ('id_rsa', kname, sequence_next ('ca_id_rsa'), 365, vector ('CN', 'Insert Test', 'C', 'FR', 'O', 'Insert Org', 'OU', 'Finance', 'emailAddress', 'insert@example.com'), vector ('subjectAltName', 'URI:http://inserttest.com', 'nsComment', 'Insert Test Certificate', 'authorityKeyIdentifier', 'keyid,issuer:always'));
